              "elements": {

                  "settings": {

                    "text_align": "center"

                "time": {
                  "settings": {
                    "font_size": 20,

                  "settings": {
                    "color": "#151515",

                    "position": "upper",

          "elements": {
            "image_slider": {
              "elements": {
                "sliding_dot": {
                  "settings": {
                    "color": "#FFFFFF",
                    "enable": true,
                    "position": "inside"

              },

                  "enable": true,

                    }
                  }
                ],

                "overlay_color": "#00000080",
                "ratio": "16/9",
                "width": "100%"
              }
            }

      "tooltip_time_to_first_order": "The average time customers take from installing app to first order within the filter time range.",

      "modal_ask_update_button": "Try it first",
      "modal_ask_update_description": "Be the first to experience our new app design features—rolling out completely in December 2024.",
      "modal_ask_update_experts_button": "Contact support",
      "modal_ask_update_experts_description": "OneMobile team is working hard on your customized app update. This process might take a few days. Our support team will inform you when the update is ready for use. Here’s an overview of what’s coming:",
      "modal_ask_update_experts_description2": "If you need to preview app for now, please contact us.",
      "modal_ask_update_experts_title": "OneMobile Preview for customized apps is being updated",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight1_description": "Smoother shopping experience for customers. No disruption to your current business. ",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight1_title": "Improved stability and performance",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight2_description": "From product details to account screen. Enhance your brand experience.",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight2_title": "Drag-drop on every screens",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight3_description": "Flexibly change themes anytime without affecting current apps’ structures. ",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight3_title": "Switch themes more easily",
      "modal_ask_update_success_button": "Continue",

      "playful": "Playful",
      "portrait": "Portrait",
      "preview": "Preview",
      "push_abandoned_cart_potential_sales_message": "In the last week, your lost sales (abandoned carts) totalled {{abandoned_cart_value}}. Time to win them back!💰",
      "push_abandoned_cart_potential_sales_title": "Don't miss out on sales! 💸",
      "push_active_users_message": "{{active_users}} new active users over the past week. Dive into user engagement metrics and bolster your retention strategies. 🚀",
      "push_active_users_title": "Active users on the rise! 📈",
      "push_app_installs_message": "Yay! You've got new {{number_installs}} app installs in the last week. Growth looks good on you!  ",
      "push_app_installs_title": "App installs are booming! 📲",
      "push_average_engagement_time_message": "Users are spending more time in your app than last week. Time to double down on what's working and introduce more captivating content or features! 🚀",
      "push_average_engagement_time_title": "User engagement climbing! ⏰",
      "push_average_order_frequency_message": "Fantastic! Your average order frequency has increased compared to last month. You're doing great, consider running loyalty programs or repeat-purchase incentives to maintain this momentum! 💥",
      "push_average_order_frequency_title": "Average order frequency boosted! 🔥",
      "push_average_order_value_message": "Good news! The average order value (AOV) has increased compared to last week. Keep up the great work and continue focusing on strategies that boost AOV! 🚀",
      "push_average_order_value_title": "Average order value rising! 📈",
      "push_average_session_number_message": "Now's the time to dive deeper into these sources and fine-tune them for stellar user engagement! 🎯",
      "push_average_session_number_title": "Boost in traffic source sessions! 🚦",
      "push_conversion_funnel_message": "Customers are engaging more with your app. 🚀 Check out how the steps of your conversion funnel have increased compared to last week.",
      "push_conversion_funnel_title": "Engagement levels rising! 🎈",
      "push_customer_lifetime_value_message": "Impressive! The lifetime value of your customer {{customer_lifetime_value}} has increased this week. Keep the momentum going💪",
      "push_customer_lifetime_value_title": "Customer lifetime value up! 💎",
      "push_favorite_products_message": "{{favourite_numbers}} items were added to the wishlist. Quick tip, stock up and maybe showcase those products a bit more? 🚀",
      "push_favorite_products_title": "More favorites, what's popular?❤️",
      "push_highest_active_hour_message": "Perfect opportunity to evaluate the peak times for sending push notifications to enhance engagement. Don't miss this golden hour! ⏰",
      "push_highest_active_hour_title": "Check active hour peaks! 📈",
      "push_monthly_active_users_message": "It's an excellent time to keep your users engaged with personalized offers or rewards for their activity. Keep growing! 💪",
      "push_monthly_active_users_title": "Monthly active users on the rise! 📈",
      "push_most_favorited_message": "Guess what? The most favorited product of this week is {{product_title}}. Consider spotlighting it in your next campaign to ride this wave of popularity! 🌟",
      "push_most_favorited_title": "Favorites leaderboard update! ❤️",
      "push_most_viewed_message": "Heads up! Your most viewed product this week is now {{product_title}}.Time to investigate why and adjust your marketing strategies accordingly! 🔍",
      "push_most_viewed_title": "Change in leaderboard! 👑",
      "push_notif": "Push notifications",
      "push_notif_description": "Manage and track all notifications.",
      "push_orders_by_traffic_sources_message": "Our orders from traffic sources have increased this week. How about optimizing these sources further for more profitable results? 🚀",
      "push_orders_by_traffic_sources_title": "Traffic source orders rising! 📈",
      "push_product_shared_message": "Your products have been shared {{shared_numbers}} times in the past week. How about a special discount code for customers to share even more? 🎁",
      "push_product_shared_title": "Product shares boost! 🚀",
      "push_product_sold_message": "You've sold {{sold_numbers}} products in the previous week. How about restocking your bestsellers and planning your next sales strategy? 🚀",
      "push_product_sold_title": "Super work! Product sales up! 🎉",
      "push_product_views_message": "Your mobile app has drawn {{product_views}} new product views in the past 7 days. Consider some promotions to convert them into sales! 🛍️",
      "push_product_views_title": "Product views skyrocketing! 🚀",
      "push_ratings_and_reviews_message": "Amazing work! Make sure to respond the reviews and feedbacks to keep shining! 🎉",
      "push_ratings_and_reviews_title": "App ratings and reviews uptick ⭐",
      "push_retention_message": "This is the perfect time to reinforce relationships. Consider launching a loyalty program or offering exclusive deals to keep them coming back! 🎁",
      "push_retention_title": "Retention rate climbing to {{retention_rate}}% 🔄",
      "push_returning_customers_message": "Well done! More returning customers this month. Consider VIP offers or special deals to reward their loyalty. Keep soaring! 👏",
      "push_returning_customers_title": "Returning customers growing! 🔄",
      "push_sessions_by_devices_message": "There's an uptake in {{number_sessions}} sessions through varied devices. Now is a good time to analyze which devices are more popular and streamline your app's performance.",
      "push_sessions_by_devices_title": "More device sessions this week! 📲",
      "push_sessions_by_traffic_sources_message": "Good news! Session times from your traffic sources have increased.",
      "push_sessions_by_traffic_sources_title": "Traffic source sessions uptick! 🚦",
      "push_signed-up_users_message": "Let's make them feel welcome with a warm welcome email or a special discount on their first purchase! 🎁",
      "push_signed-up_users_title": "{{signed_up_users}} new users on board! 🙌",
      "push_time_to_first_order_message": "Great achievement! The time to first order has shortened compared to last week. Your efforts to convert customers quickly are working! 🏆",
      "push_time_to_first_order_title": "Faster first orders! ⏳",
      "push_top_conversion_message": "Notice! Your product with the highest conversion this week is now {{product_title}}. This is a fantastic opportunity to analyze the new front-runner and ramp up your related marketing efforts! 💪",
      "push_top_conversion_title": "Conversion kings update! 🎯",
      "push_top_selling_message": "Take note! Your top-selling product for this week is now {{product_title}}. Capitalize on its popularity, ensure its stock levels and promote it more! 🥇",
      "push_top_selling_title": "Who is top seller this weeek? 💰",
      "push_top_sharing_message": "Your top-shared product this week is now {{product_title}}. Leverage this trend and encourage more sharing with targeted marketing. Let's go viral! 🚀",
      "push_top_sharing_title": "Sharing chat-top update! 🔄",
      "push_total_orders_message": "Good news! You've got {{number_orders}} new orders waiting in your app. Manage and fulfill them quickly to keep your customers happy.",
      "push_total_orders_title": "More orders this week 📦",
      "push_total_sales_message": "Your sales have been impressive this past week, reaching {{total_sales}}. Explore what's working and keep it going! 🚀",
      "push_total_sales_title": "Sales are booming! 💼💰",

      "banner_inactive_mode": "If you turn on the inactive mode, customers will see an empty screen when they open your app. Customers won't be able to browse or check out.",

      "empty_inactive_mode_description": "Sorry for this inconvenience. We're on a mission to bring you even better goodies.",

      "modal_ask_update_highlight1_description": "Smoother shopping experience for customers. No disruption to your current business. ",

      "now_on_pause_title": "Your plan is now on pause",
      "now_on_pause_message": "Take a breather, this gives you more time to plan your success. Hope to see you back soon.",
      "subscription_resumed_title": "Great, subscription is back on track",
      "subscription_resumed_message": "Your subscription has been successfully resumed. It's excited to continue this journey with you.",
      "MADP-3474": "[OneMobile Preview App] - Analytics Notification - Product Engagement",
      "push_total_sales_title": "Sales are booming! 💼💰",
      "push_total_sales_message": "Your sales have been impressive this past week, reaching {{total_sales}}. Explore what's working and keep it going! 🚀",
      "push_total_orders_title": "More orders this week 📦",
      "push_total_orders_message": "Good news! You've got {{number_orders}} new orders waiting in your app. Manage and fulfill them quickly to keep your customers happy.",
      "push_app_installs_title": "App installs are booming! 📲",
      "push_app_installs_message": "Yay! You've got new {{number_installs}} app installs in the last week. Growth looks good on you!  ",
      "push_active_users_title": "Active users on the rise! 📈",
      "push_active_users_message": "{{active_users}} new active users over the past week. Dive into user engagement metrics and bolster your retention strategies. 🚀",
      "push_ratings_and_reviews_title": "App ratings and reviews uptick ⭐",
      "push_ratings_and_reviews_message": "Amazing work! Make sure to respond the reviews and feedbacks to keep shining! 🎉",
      "push_product_views_title": "Product views skyrocketing! 🚀",
      "push_product_views_message": "Your mobile app has drawn {{product_views}} new product views in the past 7 days. Consider some promotions to convert them into sales! 🛍️",
      "push_product_sold_title": "Super work! Product sales up! 🎉",
      "push_product_sold_message": "You've sold {{sold_numbers}} products in the previous week. How about restocking your bestsellers and planning your next sales strategy? 🚀",
      "push_favorite_products_title": "More favorites, what's popular?❤️",
      "push_favorite_products_message": "{{favourite_numbers}} items were added to the wishlist. Quick tip, stock up and maybe showcase those products a bit more? 🚀",
      "push_product_shared_title": "Product shares boost! 🚀",
      "push_product_shared_message": "Your products have been shared {{shared_numbers}} times in the past week. How about a special discount code for customers to share even more? 🎁",
      "push_most_viewed_title": "Change in leaderboard! 👑",
      "push_most_viewed_message": "Heads up! Your most viewed product this week is now {{product_title}}.Time to investigate why and adjust your marketing strategies accordingly! 🔍",
      "push_top_selling_title": "Who is top seller this weeek? 💰",
      "push_top_selling_message": "Take note! Your top-selling product for this week is now {{product_title}}. Capitalize on its popularity, ensure its stock levels and promote it more! 🥇",
      "push_top_conversion_title": "Conversion kings update! 🎯",
      "push_top_conversion_message": "Notice! Your product with the highest conversion this week is now {{product_title}}. This is a fantastic opportunity to analyze the new front-runner and ramp up your related marketing efforts! 💪",
      "push_most_favorited_title": "Favorites leaderboard update! ❤️",
      "push_most_favorited_message": "Guess what? The most favorited product of this week is {{product_title}}. Consider spotlighting it in your next campaign to ride this wave of popularity! 🌟",
      "push_top_sharing_title": "Sharing chat-top update! 🔄",
      "push_top_sharing_message": "Your top-shared product this week is now {{product_title}}. Leverage this trend and encourage more sharing with targeted marketing. Let's go viral! 🚀",
      "push_abandoned_cart_potential_sales_title": "Don't miss out on sales! 💸",
      "push_abandoned_cart_potential_sales_message": "In the last week, your lost sales (abandoned carts) totalled {{abandoned_cart_value}}. Time to win them back!💰",
      "push_average_order_value_title": "Average order value rising! 📈",
      "push_average_order_value_message": "Good news! The average order value (AOV) has increased compared to last week. Keep up the great work and continue focusing on strategies that boost AOV! 🚀",
      "push_time_to_first_order_title": "Faster first orders! ⏳",
      "push_time_to_first_order_message": "Great achievement! The time to first order has shortened compared to last week. Your efforts to convert customers quickly are working! 🏆",
      "push_orders_by_traffic_sources_title": "Traffic source orders rising! 📈",
      "push_orders_by_traffic_sources_message": "Our orders from traffic sources have increased this week. How about optimizing these sources further for more profitable results? 🚀",
      "push_conversion_funnel_title": "Engagement levels rising! 🎈",
      "push_conversion_funnel_message": "Customers are engaging more with your app. 🚀 Check out how the steps of your conversion funnel have increased compared to last week.",
      "push_signed-up_users_title": "{{signed_up_users}} new users on board! 🙌",
      "push_signed-up_users_message": "Let's make them feel welcome with a warm welcome email or a special discount on their first purchase! 🎁",
      "push_retention_title": "Retention rate climbing to {{retention_rate}}% 🔄",
      "push_retention_message": "This is the perfect time to reinforce relationships. Consider launching a loyalty program or offering exclusive deals to keep them coming back! 🎁",
      "push_average_engagement_time_title": "User engagement climbing! ⏰",
      "push_average_engagement_time_message": "Users are spending more time in your app than last week. Time to double down on what's working and introduce more captivating content or features! 🚀",
      "push_sessions_by_traffic_sources_title": "Traffic source sessions uptick! 🚦",
      "push_sessions_by_traffic_sources_message": "Good news! Session times from your traffic sources have increased.",
      "push_average_session_number_title": "Boost in traffic source sessions! 🚦",
      "push_average_session_number_message": "Now's the time to dive deeper into these sources and fine-tune them for stellar user engagement! 🎯",
      "push_sessions_by_devices_title": "More device sessions this week! 📲",
      "push_sessions_by_devices_message": "There's an uptake in {{number_sessions}} sessions through varied devices. Now is a good time to analyze which devices are more popular and streamline your app's performance.",
      "push_customer_lifetime_value_title": "Customer lifetime value up! 💎",
      "push_customer_lifetime_value_message": "Impressive! The lifetime value of your customer {{customer_lifetime_value}} has increased this week. Keep the momentum going💪",
      "push_highest_active_hour_title": "Check active hour peaks! 📈",
      "push_highest_active_hour_message": "Perfect opportunity to evaluate the peak times for sending push notifications to enhance engagement. Don't miss this golden hour! ⏰",
      "push_monthly_active_users_title": "Monthly active users on the rise! 📈",
      "push_monthly_active_users_message": "It's an excellent time to keep your users engaged with personalized offers or rewards for their activity. Keep growing! 💪",
      "push_average_order_frequency_title": "Average order frequency boosted! 🔥",
      "push_average_order_frequency_message": "Fantastic! Your average order frequency has increased compared to last month. You're doing great, consider running loyalty programs or repeat-purchase incentives to maintain this momentum! 💥",
      "push_returning_customers_title": "Returning customers growing! 🔄",
      "push_returning_customers_message": "Well done! More returning customers this month. Consider VIP offers or special deals to reward their loyalty. Keep soaring! 👏",

      "tooltip_abandoned_potential_sales": "The estimated sales could have generated if customers had completed their purchases.",
      "tooltip_average_order_frequency": "The average number of times a customer places orders within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_average_order_value": "The average amount of money customers spent on each order within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_average_session_length": "The average time customers spent using your app within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_average_session_number": "The average number of times a user opens and uses your apps within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_comparison": "The increase or decrease in the amount compared to the previous period.",
      "tooltip_conversion_funnel": "Track customer journey, from session start to order placed within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_conversion_rate": "The products that are most purchased by how often customers visit within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_currency_changed": "Your recent store currency change may be impacting app analytics. You can reset your currency settings to restore accurate tracking.",
      "tooltip_customer_lifetime_value": "Total sales you can expect from a customer within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_favorited_products": "The total product items that customers added to their wishlist within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_highest_active_hour": "The total customer sessions by day and by hour (UTC-7) within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_new_app_sessions": "The total count of new and returning sessions within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_order_by_sources": "The breakdown of orders placed by where customers came from within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_products_shared": "The total number of times your products are shared within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_ratings_reviews": "The number of times that users have submitted ratings and reviews to App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android) within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_retention": "The ratio of customer return sessions to new sessions within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_returning_customers": "The percentage of customers who return to make another purchase after their initial purchase.",
      "tooltip_sessions_by_devices": "The total count of sessions breakdown by device types within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_sessions_by_traffic_sources": "The total count of sessions breakdown by traffic sources within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_signed_up_users": "Customers who signed up to create an account on your apps within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_table_items": "The total number of product items sold within the filter time range.",
      "tooltip_table_most_favorited": "The total time customers added the product to their wishlist within the filter time range.",

      "modal_ask_update_button": "Try it first",
      "modal_ask_update_description": "Be the first to experience our new app design features—rolling out completely in December 2024.",
      "modal_ask_update_experts_button": "Contact support",
      "modal_ask_update_experts_description": "OneMobile team is working hard on your customized app update. This process might take a few days. Our support team will inform you when the update is ready for use. Here’s an overview of what’s coming:",
      "modal_ask_update_experts_description2": "If you need to preview app for now, please contact us.",
      "modal_ask_update_experts_title": "OneMobile Preview for customized apps is being updated",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight1_description": "Smoother shopping experience for customers. No disruption to your current business. ",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight1_title": "Improved stability and performance",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight2_description": "From product details to account screen. Enhance your brand experience.",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight2_title": "Drag-drop on every screens",
      "modal_ask_update_highlight3_description": "Flexibly change themes anytime without affecting current apps’ structures. ",

      "permission_notification_desc": "Turn on notifications and never miss important updates, offers, or sales news from OneMobile:",
      "permission_notification_title": "Get updates instantly",
      "platform_device": "{{platform}} devices",
      "playful": "Playful",
      "portrait": "Portrait",
      "preview": "Preview",
      "push_abandoned_cart_potential_sales_message": "In the last week, your lost sales (abandoned carts) totalled {{abandoned_cart_value}}. Time to win them back!💰",
      "push_abandoned_cart_potential_sales_title": "Don't miss out on sales! 💸",
      "push_active_users_message": "{{active_users}} new active users over the past week. Dive into user engagement metrics and bolster your retention strategies. 🚀",
      "push_active_users_title": "Active users on the rise! 📈",
      "push_app_installs_message": "Yay! You've got new {{number_installs}} app installs in the last week. Growth looks good on you!  ",
      "push_app_installs_title": "App installs are booming! 📲",
      "push_average_engagement_time_message": "Users are spending more time in your app than last week. Time to double down on what's working and introduce more captivating content or features! 🚀",
      "push_average_engagement_time_title": "User engagement climbing! ⏰",
      "push_average_order_frequency_message": "Fantastic! Your average order frequency has increased compared to last month. You're doing great, consider running loyalty programs or repeat-purchase incentives to maintain this momentum! 💥",
      "push_average_order_frequency_title": "Average order frequency boosted! 🔥",
      "push_average_order_value_message": "Good news! The average order value (AOV) has increased compared to last week. Keep up the great work and continue focusing on strategies that boost AOV! 🚀",
      "push_average_order_value_title": "Average order value rising! 📈",
      "push_average_session_number_message": "Now's the time to dive deeper into these sources and fine-tune them for stellar user engagement! 🎯",
      "push_average_session_number_title": "Boost in traffic source sessions! 🚦",
      "push_conversion_funnel_message": "Customers are engaging more with your app. 🚀 Check out how the steps of your conversion funnel have increased compared to last week.",
      "push_conversion_funnel_title": "Engagement levels rising! 🎈",
      "push_customer_lifetime_value_message": "Impressive! The lifetime value of your customer {{customer_lifetime_value}} has increased this week. Keep the momentum going💪",
      "push_customer_lifetime_value_title": "Customer lifetime value up! 💎",
      "push_favorite_products_message": "{{favourite_numbers}} items were added to the wishlist. Quick tip, stock up and maybe showcase those products a bit more? 🚀",
      "push_favorite_products_title": "More favorites, what's popular?❤️",
      "push_highest_active_hour_message": "Perfect opportunity to evaluate the peak times for sending push notifications to enhance engagement. Don't miss this golden hour! ⏰",
      "push_highest_active_hour_title": "Check active hour peaks! 📈",
      "push_monthly_active_users_message": "It's an excellent time to keep your users engaged with personalized offers or rewards for their activity. Keep growing! 💪",
      "push_monthly_active_users_title": "Monthly active users on the rise! 📈",
      "push_most_favorited_message": "Guess what? The most favorited product of this week is {{product_title}}. Consider spotlighting it in your next campaign to ride this wave of popularity! 🌟",
      "push_most_favorited_title": "Favorites leaderboard update! ❤️",
      "push_most_viewed_message": "Heads up! Your most viewed product this week is now {{product_title}}.Time to investigate why and adjust your marketing strategies accordingly! 🔍",
      "push_most_viewed_title": "Change in leaderboard! 👑",
      "push_notif": "Push notifications",
      "push_notif_description": "Manage and track all notifications.",
      "push_orders_by_traffic_sources_message": "Our orders from traffic sources have increased this week. How about optimizing these sources further for more profitable results? 🚀",
      "push_orders_by_traffic_sources_title": "Traffic source orders rising! 📈",
      "push_product_shared_message": "Your products have been shared {{shared_numbers}} times in the past week. How about a special discount code for customers to share even more? 🎁",
      "push_product_shared_title": "Product shares boost! 🚀",
      "push_product_sold_message": "You've sold {{sold_numbers}} products in the previous week. How about restocking your bestsellers and planning your next sales strategy? 🚀",
      "push_product_sold_title": "Super work! Product sales up! 🎉",
      "push_product_views_message": "Your mobile app has drawn {{product_views}} new product views in the past 7 days. Consider some promotions to convert them into sales! 🛍️",
      "push_product_views_title": "Product views skyrocketing! 🚀",
      "push_ratings_and_reviews_message": "Amazing work! Make sure to respond the reviews and feedbacks to keep shining! 🎉",
      "push_ratings_and_reviews_title": "App ratings and reviews uptick ⭐",
      "push_retention_message": "This is the perfect time to reinforce relationships. Consider launching a loyalty program or offering exclusive deals to keep them coming back! 🎁",
      "push_retention_title": "Retention rate climbing to {{retention_rate}}% 🔄",
      "push_returning_customers_message": "Well done! More returning customers this month. Consider VIP offers or special deals to reward their loyalty. Keep soaring! 👏",
      "push_returning_customers_title": "Returning customers growing! 🔄",
      "push_sessions_by_devices_message": "There's an uptake in {{number_sessions}} sessions through varied devices. Now is a good time to analyze which devices are more popular and streamline your app's performance.",
      "push_sessions_by_devices_title": "More device sessions this week! 📲",
      "push_sessions_by_traffic_sources_message": "Good news! Session times from your traffic sources have increased.",
      "push_sessions_by_traffic_sources_title": "Traffic source sessions uptick! 🚦",
      "push_signed-up_users_message": "Let's make them feel welcome with a warm welcome email or a special discount on their first purchase! 🎁",
      "push_signed-up_users_title": "{{signed_up_users}} new users on board! 🙌",
      "push_time_to_first_order_message": "Great achievement! The time to first order has shortened compared to last week. Your efforts to convert customers quickly are working! 🏆",
      "push_time_to_first_order_title": "Faster first orders! ⏳",
      "push_top_conversion_message": "Notice! Your product with the highest conversion this week is now {{product_title}}. This is a fantastic opportunity to analyze the new front-runner and ramp up your related marketing efforts! 💪",
      "push_top_conversion_title": "Conversion kings update! 🎯",
      "push_top_selling_message": "Take note! Your top-selling product for this week is now {{product_title}}. Capitalize on its popularity, ensure its stock levels and promote it more! 🥇",
      "push_top_selling_title": "Who is top seller this weeek? 💰",
      "push_top_sharing_message": "Your top-shared product this week is now {{product_title}}. Leverage this trend and encourage more sharing with targeted marketing. Let's go viral! 🚀",
      "push_top_sharing_title": "Sharing chat-top update! 🔄",
      "push_total_orders_message": "Good news! You've got {{number_orders}} new orders waiting in your app. Manage and fulfill them quickly to keep your customers happy.",
      "push_total_orders_title": "More orders this week 📦",
      "push_total_sales_message": "Your sales have been impressive this past week, reaching {{total_sales}}. Explore what's working and keep it going! 🚀",
      "push_total_sales_title": "Sales are booming! 💼💰",
